module.trigger.log.trigger_skipped_all_o: Trigger skipped: all options are disabled
module.trigger.description:
### Tips
* Auto Assist runs in the background and will not block other real-time tasks.
* Enabling Auto F will automatically interact with gatherable or persuadable targets.
* Enabling Nita Auto E will assist with key presses during QTE phases.
module.trigger.field.CheckBox_trigger_au: Automatically press E during QTE phases.
Automatically press F when a gatherable or persuadable interaction icon appears.
module.trigger.title: Auto Assist
